orchestrator.retryStrategy: split over-large prompt; retry SMALLER (half prompt + fewer tokens), bounded — never infinite

behaviourWithoutOllamaOrGpu: Every call reports Available=false after bounded retries; the deterministic caller falls back. Core behaviour requires no GPU.
honest: Telemetry shape and degradation are validated WITHOUT a GPU or a live Ollama. No live-GPU throughput numbers are claimed; the run-queue, token budget, and bounded-retry logic are what is proven.
